headline: A Look At American Tower’s Valuation As Shares Face Recent Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Without a specific news catalyst, American Tower (AMT) has been drawing attention for its recent share performance, with the stock down 2% over the past day and about 5% over the past week. Over the past month the share price has declined about 3%, while over the past 3 months it is down roughly 11%. Over the past year, the total return is down about 16%, and over 5 years it is down about 21%. At a recent close of US$170.50 and a market value of...
